name: nova
description: AI provider SDK + MCP server scaffolding. Canonical contracts (chat, embeddings, models, stream, usage), OpenAI-compat adapter factory, and cross-cutting helpers for MCP servers. Monorepo housing @nova/contracts + @nova/mcp-shared + @nova/mcp.

scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/contracts typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/mcp-shared typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/mcp typecheck
